comment: Focused corpus: direct pathway (zoom < 40) at very high iteration counts (>25k). Prioritizes views with many border pixels (high-but-not-max escape counts) per 2026-07-06 experiment direction; interior/f64-trapped views kept as secondary coverage. Composition percentages come from 64x64 probes of the tile extent (scratchpad probes, 2026-07-06).

cases.note: One tile above the reported point: ~6% interior, escapers mean ~1.7k / max ~43k — border-pixel-heavy, escaped work dominates
3/4 tile right of the reported point: high-escape band (escaper p90 ~8.4k, max ~48k) beside interior blob (~74%)
Seahorse spiral, 0% interior, escapers mean ~1.1k: every pixel escapes, measures per-iteration throughput + any check overhead
Seahorse valley: ~33% cardioid/bulb interior walls + slow-escape channel (escaper max ~46k at 51200)
Reported URL tile: ~98% interior (minibrot), Brent-detectable p50 ~8.4k; escapers mean ~6k
Cusp channel d=1e-6: 100% of pixels run full max_iterations (f64-trapped near-parabolic crawl), only ~1/3 exactly periodic and late — worst-case throughput tile
